description_long: This is a large, vintage-style hardcover book with a brown, textured cover adorned with ornate gold embellishments in the corners. The cover is worn, suggesting age and frequent handling, and features visible decorative flourishes. Several aged, yellowed pages protrude from the edges, some unevenly, giving the book a well-used and historical appearance. The spine and cover both display bold, distressed lettering, adding to the antique aesthetic. The book appears thick and substantial, with a solid, rectangular form. There are no visible illustrations or images on the cover aside from the decorative gold patterns.
description: A thick, antique brown hardcover book with ornate gold decorations and distressed lettering, featuring protruding aged pages.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing ornate gold corner designs, distressed lettering, and several protruding pages at the bottom edge.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the thickness, the aged pages sticking out, and the gold-decorated cover.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, with less text but still showing the ornate gold corner designs and some protruding pages.
description_view_3: The spine is shown, featuring large, distressed lettering and a continuation of the brown, textured cover with gold accents.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is brown with a textured, worn appearance and features large, distressed white lettering running horizontally. There are no additional decorative elements or patterns beyond the text.
